_comment: Rationales for ex7 task1. The decision/trigger gold is INLINE in scenarios.json (like ex3's cases); this file adds the why and marks the debatable cases. Score only the 10 non-debatable cases; never count 11 or 12 against the student.

labels.rationale: Self-serve how-to; no defect, no authority issue.
User explicitly demanded a human — honor it regardless of whether the bot could help.
$4,000 is 80x the $50 auto-approve limit; outside authority.
Order lookup is squarely in scope.
Standard troubleshooting exhausted; the agent can't resolve it.
Irreversible deletion + identity/compliance; not an auto-handle action.
Address change on an unshipped order is within policy.
Third unresolved contact on the same issue — escalate, don't loop.
Legal advice is outside the assistant's authorized scope.
DEBATABLE: policy is silent on goodwill discounts. Accept HANDLE/none (if a small credit is in scope) or ESCALATE/policy_gap (if discounts need approval). Do not count against the student.
DEBATABLE: re-explaining is reasonable (HANDLE/none); a second failed attempt could justify ESCALATE/no_progress. Accept either. Do not count against the student.
